nasb.text: He will be like a tree firmly planted by streams of water, Which yields its fruit in its season And its leaf does not wither; And in whatever he does, he prospers.

esv.text: He is like a tree planted by streams of water that yields its fruit in its season, and its leaf does not wither. In all that he does, he prospers.

cnv.text: 他像一棵樹，栽在溪水旁， 按時結果子， 葉子總不枯乾； 他所作的一切，盡都順利。

ccb.text: 他就像溪水旁的树木—— 按时结果子， 叶子也不凋零。 他必凡事亨通。

csbs.text: 他像一棵树，栽种在溪水旁， 他的果实按时结出， 他的叶子也不凋零， 他所做的一切，都会兴盛。
